Gleneagles India operates a network of world-class multi-specialty hospitals in Chennai, Bangalore, and Hyderabad, equipped with over 900 state-of-the-art beds. Recognised as the pioneers in the fields of Kidney, Liver, Heart, and Lung Transplants, we're at the forefront of providing comprehensive Multi-organ Transplant services throughout the nation. Our commitment doesn't end there: Gleneagles Hospitals is steadfast in its mission to consolidate and further its reputation as the preferred destination for Multi-organ Transplants for patients spanning from India to the Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our vision is clear – to make premium healthcare both accessible and affordable for everyone. We take immense pride in our dedicated team of consultants and surgeons, who are not just leaders in their respective specialities but also revered figures in the medical world. NABH accreditation is an assurance that healthcare providers meet specific standards of patient safety and care. It is widely recognized as a symbol of quality in the healthcare industry and can foster credibility and trust between healthcare organizations, patients, healthcare professionals, and other stakeholders. Read more Accreditations NABL The National Accreditation Board for Testing and Calibration Laboratories (NABL) is a board that operates under the Quality Council of India. It is responsible for providing accreditation to testing and calibration laboratories in India, and for promoting the quality of testing and calibration services in the country. By achieving NABL accreditation, our laboratory has demonstrated its ability to perform accurate and reliable tests and measurements, and to ensure that its results are traceable to national or international standards. NABL accreditation also indicates that the laboratory has implemented a quality management system that adheres to international standards and best practices.
